summary: MakerWorld design IDs are numeric; endpoint-command examples and verifier fixtures must use a real numeric ID, never a UUID.
reason: comment-service/commentandrating runs strconv.ParseInt on designId and returns HTTP 400 for non-numeric input, so a synthesized UUID fixture fails live dogfood. designs get/ratings/related/remixes carry pp:happy-args / pp:no-error-path-probe annotations and numeric examples (2865269) for this reason.
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood 75/75 after numeric fixtures applied (UUID fixture previously caused 4 failures).
